text:
Created attachment 224946
screenshot

The current template of the website has the following titles:

The FreeBSD Projects | About FreeBSD
The FreeBSD Projects | FreeBSD Logo

etc.

..which keeps the more interesting part at the back, and if you are using chrome/firefox, they might get truncated (see screenshot). IMO we should switch them around so they look like:

About FreeBSD | The FreeBSD Projects
